creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
[resent to GNATS only - pilot error botched the first try]

There have been a whole shedload of recent changes to both
ports and the base system with respect to openssl.

With a fully up-to-date ports tree (at least rev 1.63 of
the port Makefile), can you confirm that you're still seeing
this problem?

-aDe

-- 
Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.
